/etc/clion-2021.1.3/bin/cmake/linux/bin/cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -G "CodeBlocks - Unix Makefiles" /home/alex/Projects/tkDNN-python
-- Found CUDNN: /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudnn.so
-- Found CUDNN include: /usr/local/cuda/include
-- Found NVINFER: /usr/local/TensorRT-7.2.1.6/lib/libnvinfer.so
-- Found NVINFER include: NVINFER_INCLUDE_DIR-NOTFOUND
install dir:/usr/local
-- Configuring done
-- Generating done
